title: SWMF (Space Weather Modeling Framework)
description: A high-performance, block-adaptive numerical framework built for coupled global physics simulations, spanning from the solar corona to the Earth's magnetosphere.

title: MAS (Magnetohydrodynamics Around a Sphere)
description: A state-of-the-art, parallelized MHD code designed for simulating the solar corona and heliosphere, with applications in space weather forecasting and coronal dynamics.

title: HipFT (High-Performance Flux Transport)
description: A specialized numerical code for simulating solar surface flux transport processes, including the advection of magnetic flux by surface flows and the emergence of active regions.

title: MPI-AMRVAC (Adaptive Mesh Refinement Versatile Advection Code)
description: A flexible, high-performance code for solving hyperbolic partial differential equations with adaptive mesh refinement, widely used in astrophysical fluid dynamics and MHD simulations.

title: PLUTO Code
description: A computational framework to model MHFD equations in astrophysical context.

title: PFSS (Potential Field SOurce Surface Extrapolation
description: A simple python package for PFSS extrapolation using magnetograms in spherical polar coordinates.

title: POT3D (Potential Field Extrapolation in 3D)
description: A computational tool for performing potential field extrapolations of solar magnetic fields, used to model the coronal magnetic structure based on photospheric magnetogram data.

title: UFiT (Universal Fieldline Tracer)
description: A versatile fieldline tracing code designed for analyzing magnetic connectivity and topology in solar and heliospheric magnetic field models, with applications in coronal and solar wind studies.

title: HUXt
description: Heliospheric Upwind Extrapolation with time dependence.

title: Solar Flare Catalogue
description: Access curated flare event libraries, including peak intensity metrics, GOES X-ray classification parameters, and associated active region indices.
